question.string: Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
ASK {
  ?work wdt:P50 wd:Q20011098 .
  ?work wdt:P1441 ?series .
  FILTER(?series != wd:Q51671721)
}

question.string: are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
ASK {
  ?brooke wdt:P19 ?brooke_place .
  ?colin wdt:P19 ?colin_place .
  ?brooke_place wdt:P625 ?brooke_coords .
  ?colin_place wdt:P625 ?colin_coords .
  ?usa wdt:P625 ?usa_coords .
  FILTER(?brooke_coords = ?colin_coords)
}

question.string: Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?verb ?lemma WHERE {
  ?verb wdt:P31 wd:Q17524420 .
  ?verb wdt:P1963 ?lemma .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?lemma), "uş"))
}

In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?
How many All-NBA Team awards have Shaquille O'Neal and Kobe Bryant received in the same year?

query.sparql:
ASK {
  ?award wdt:P31 wd:Q66796038 .
  ?award wdt:P1411 wd:Q674359 .
  ?player1 wdt:P106 wd:Q36629 .  # basketball player
  ?player1 wdt:P40 ?award .
  ?player1 wdt:P551 wd:Q25369 .  # Shaquille O'Neal
  ?player2 wdt:P106 wd:Q36629 .  # basketball player
  ?player2 wdt:P40 ?award .
  ?player2 wdt:P551 wd:Q169452 .  # Kobe Bryant
  FILTER(?player1 != ?player2)
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

  ?country wdt:P6256 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P8328 ?democracyIndex .
  ?country wdt:P12800 wd:Q66716595 .
  FILTER(?democracyIndex > 7)
}

How many official languages has Pakistan ?
How many Oscars did all the movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki combined win?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (SUM(?awards) AS ?totalAwards) WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P57 wd:Q55400.
  ?film wdt:P166 ?award.
  ?award wdt:P31 wd:Q19020.
  BIND(COUNT(?award) AS ?awards)
}
